title: Bartoline Boiled Linseed Oil 2 L, Fast-Drying Wood Protector for Softwood Garden Furniture and Interior Wood (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
ENHANCES AND PROTECTS WOOD: Deeply nourishes softwood surfaces, preventing drying, cracking, and sun damage while providing a rich, natural sheen
FAST-DRYING FORMULA: Contains additives to speed up the drying process, making it for quick and efficient wood treatment
FOR GARDEN AND INTERIOR USE: Designed for softwood garden furniture, doors, and wooden surfaces, keeping them resilient against weathering and wear
EASY TO APPLY AND ABSORBENT: Simply apply with a clean cloth or brush, rubbing in well; for the best protection, apply 2-3 coats with 24-hour drying intervals
SAFE HANDLING AND CLEANUP: Dispose of application cloths responsibly to prevent fire hazards; clean tools with Bartoline White Spirit for easy maintenance
